name: Veal Scallops with Asparagus, Lime Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Asparagus, fresh, trimmed and blanched
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 teaspoon saffron threads with flour, salt, and pepper.
Dust both sides of veal scallops with the seasoned flour.
Brown the veal in oil on both sides for about 5 minutes total.
Remove the veal to a serving platter and keep warm.
2. Deglaze the skillet with wine, then add lime zest, lime juice,
and remaining saffron. Bring the mixture to a boil and reduce
to the consistency of syrup. Stir in heavy cream, bring to another
boil, and stir in peppercorns. Surround the veal scallops with asparagus
and top with sauce.
